testCases.title: Verify that login fails with invalid password

steps.action: Send POST request to /login endpoint ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Request should be accepted | Include valid username in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Username should be processed | Include invalid password in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Password should be processed | Submit authentication request ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Response should return 401 status code | Validate error message in response ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Error message should indicate invalid credentials

testCases.title: To Test Login Form with Invalid Data
Verify that login works with valid credentials

steps.action: Open login page ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Login page should display | Enter valid username ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Username accepted | Enter valid password ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Password accepted | Click login button ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў User should login successfully

testCases.title: To Test Login Form with Invalid Data
Verify that login fails with invalid username

steps.action: Send POST request to /login endpoint ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Request should be accepted | Include invalid username in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Username should be processed | Include valid password in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Password should be processed | Submit authentication request ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Response should return 401 status code | Validate error message in response ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Error message should indicate invalid credentials

testCases.title: Verify that login fails with empty username

steps.action: Send POST request to /login endpoint ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Request should be accepted | Include empty username field in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Empty username should be processed | Include valid password in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Password should be processed | Submit authentication request ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Response should return 400 status code | Validate error message indicates missing username ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Appropriate error message should be returned

testCases.title: Verify that login works with valid credentials

steps.action: Send POST request to /login endpoint ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Request should be accepted | Include valid username in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Username should be processed | Include valid password in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Password should be processed | Submit authentication request ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Response should return 200 status code | Validate response contains authentication token ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Token should be present in response

testCases.title: TC_Verify that login fails with empty password

steps.action: Send POST request to /login endpoint ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Request should be accepted | Include valid username in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Username should be processed | Include empty password field in request body ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Empty password should be processed | Submit authentication request ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Response should return 400 status code | Validate error message indicates missing password ГѓВўГўв‚¬В Гўв‚¬в„ў Appropriate error message should be returned
